[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a close-up of an educational illustration about urine and the urinary system, with kidneys and labeled parts beside Spanish text.

A central anatomical depiction shows a dark brown, bean-shaped organ with a pale yellowish top portion resembling tissue. A blue square with the white number “1” appears on the organ. Nearby, thin illustrated tubes in blue and orange run upward and outward, crossing at a blue star-shaped/branching junction, with a separate blue square labeled “3” placed along a lower orange tube.

The setting is a printed page, photographed at an angle, with part of a diagram and surrounding white background. Lighting is even and indoor-like, with the page filling most of the frame; the right side includes the edge of a larger illustrated section in blue.

It’s a close-up of a printed medical/educational diagram showing urinary system anatomy. The illustration includes labeled numbered sections and accompanying partially visible Spanish text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
